creator: aloiswenzel@gmx.net
text:
portmaster-2.2 deletes jdk-6u3-fcs-src-b05-jrl-24_sep_2007.jar during jdk16's installation after testing the MD5 checksum. Due to this the installation fails. Installing manually with 'cd /usr/ports/java/jdk16/;make install clean' works fine.

How-To-Repeat: Install jdk16 with portmaster-2.2.
